items.q: How much does website creation cost in {{city}}?
items.a: The price depends on the type and complexity of the project. My packages start from a simple showcase site from 2,000 MAD. Contact me for a free, personalised quote tailored to your budget and goals.

items.q: How long does it take to deliver a website?
items.a: A showcase site is delivered in 5 days, an e-commerce in 7 days. Timelines depend on the availability of content (texts, images, logo) you provide.

items.q: Will my site rank well on Google in {{city}}?
items.a: Yes. All my sites are delivered with full technical SEO: title and meta tags, H1/H2/H3 structure, clean URLs, optimised images, fast and responsive. I also offer advanced SEO services to rank your site on Google's first page in {{city}}.

items.q: Can I update my site's content myself after delivery?
items.a: Absolutely. All my sites come with an intuitive admin interface letting you update texts, images, products and pages without any technical knowledge. A training session is included in all packages.

items.q: Do you offer maintenance and support after delivery?
items.a: Yes. I provide responsive technical support via WhatsApp and phone after delivery. Monthly maintenance contracts are available for updates, security and site evolution.

items.q: Will my site work on mobile and tablet?
items.a: Yes, all my sites are 100% responsive and automatically adapt to smartphones, tablets and computers. Mobile-friendliness is essential for SEO and user experience — included in all packages.

items.q: Do you only work in {{city}} or across Morocco?
items.a: I work across Morocco and internationally. I collaborate with clients in Casablanca, Rabat, Marrakech, Tangier, Fes, Agadir and beyond. All project management is done remotely via WhatsApp, email and video calls.

items.q: What is included in the hosting?
items.a: Hosting included in my packages covers: high-performance SSD storage, SSL certificate (HTTPS), professional emails with your domain, regular backups and domain name for the first year. 99.9% uptime guaranteed.
